title: rosa canina var. transsilvanica
intro: Rosa canina var. transsilvanica, also known as the Transylvanian dog rose or Romanian dog rose, is a variant of the Rosa canina species, a flowering shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. transsilvanica include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. Rosa canina var. transsilvanica can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application and internal consumption.
